text:
```bash
docker build -t app:latest . && docker run -p 8080:8080 -e ENV=prod -v /data:/mnt app:latest
```

```bash
git checkout -b feat/x && git add . && git commit -m 'feat: x' && git push -u origin feat/x
```

```bash
kubectl apply -f deploy.yaml && kubectl rollout status deploy/app && kubectl logs deploy/app -f
```

```bash
sqlite3 db.db '.backup backup.db' && sqlite3 db.db 'VACUUM;' && sqlite3 db.db '.dump' > dump.sql
```

```bash
pip install -qr requirements.txt && pytest tests/ --cov=src && twine upload dist/*
```

```bash
mlflow run . -P lr=0.001 -P epochs=10 && wandb login && wandb sync
```

```bash
kubectl get pods,svc,deploy -o wide
```

```bash
helm upgrade --install myapp ./chart --set image.tag=v1.2.3 --set replicas=3
```
